title: Lab 05: Users Groups And Sudo
description: Create local users, a delegated admin group, and passwordless privileged access

tasks: Create the group opsrune and the users brenor, lyessa, and quillan. Put brenor and lyessa in opsrune as a supplementary group. Sarahx must have /sbin/nologin and must not be in opsrune.
Set the password of all three users to cinder9.
Allow members of opsrune to run useradd through sudo, and allow brenor to run passwd for other users without a sudo password prompt.
hints: Create sudo policy files under /etc/sudoers.d and validate them with visudo.
checks: id -nG brenor | tr ' ' '\n' | grep -qx opsrune && getent passwd brenor >/dev/null
id -nG lyessa | tr ' ' '\n' | grep -qx opsrune && getent passwd lyessa >/dev/null
task_titles: Create the group opsrune and the users brenor,...
Set the password of all three users to cinder9
Allow members of opsrune to run useradd through...
